channel.title: New Global Studies
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in New Global Studies

item.title: Frontmatter

item.title: Decolonizing the Past and Confronting Climate Change Futures: Bringing the State Back In

item.title: The Political Economy of Trade, Work, and Economy: De-globalization – or Re-globalization?
item.description: Article by Jan Nederveen Pieterse DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ngs-2024-0011

item.title: Obsolete Pasts? Globalization as an Analytical Prism in Vincenzo Formaleoni’s History of the Black Sea (1788–89)
item.description: Article by Jan Nederveen Pieterse DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ngs-2024-0027

item.description: Article by Jan Nederveen Pieterse DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/ngs-2024-0009
